subject: Delivery Challan for Batch #8812
body: Hi team, please find attached the delivery challan for the 50 steel sheets dispatched this morning. Kindly acknowledge receipt upon unloading so our drivers can clear the site.

subject: Invoice INV-2026-9901 for April Services
body: Dear Accounts Team, please find our tax invoice INV-2026-9901 attached for consulting services rendered in April 2026. Payment terms are net 30. Let us know if you need any adjustments.

subject: New Purchase Order: PO-77621
body: Hello, please process our enclosed purchase order PO-77621 for 500 units of Product X. We require delivery to our central warehouse by next Friday. Confirm receipt and estimated dispatch date.

subject: Inquiry regarding bulk pricing for corporate gifting
body: Hello, I am looking to procure around 200 customized premium notebooks for an upcoming corporate event. Could you share your catalog, lead times, and bulk discount rates?

subject: Payment Advice - Ref: EFT-99102
body: Please note that an electronic fund transfer of INR 4,50,000 has been initiated today toward clearing outstanding balances. Refer to the attached advice sheet for transaction references.

subject: Request for Quotation - Cement Supply
body: We are inviting bids for the supply of 1000 bags of Grade 53 cement for our smart city project site. Please submit your lowest quotation along with tax breakdowns by Monday evening.

subject: CRITICAL EDGE CASE: Mixed Multi-Intent Request
body: Hi, I just reviewed the Vendor Quotation you sent over, but your logistics team sent us completely wrong items last week which is a massive issue. However, we urgently need to keep production running, so please find attached our official Customer Purchase Order PO-9002 for 100 units of Part B. Process this PO immediately while your support team fixes the original error.

subject: EDGE CASE: Highly Vague / Zero Context Document
body: Please review the attached immediately and update the ledger entry based on what we discussed over our quick phone call yesterday morning. Needs to happen before the day ends.

subject: COMPLAINT / ESCALATION: Shipment delayed by over 4 days
body: This is completely unacceptable. Our consignment was supposed to arrive on Tuesday, and your tracking link still shows 'In Transit'. This delay is hurting our production lines. I want a refund or immediate tracking updates right now!

subject: Boost your B2B sales leads by 10x using this new automated framework!
body: Hey there, absolute game-changing opportunity! We noticed your company's web profile and wanted to offer a free trial of our automated scraping platform. No credit card required. Let's schedule a brief 10-minute discovery call this week?
